sqlMap.select:
select count(*) from e_defuseinfo_t di LEFT JOIN e_contradictioninfo_t ct on di.cdtid=ct.id where di.validflag>0 and ct.validflag>0
di.workinfoid = #workinfoid#
di.cdtid = #cdtid#
ct.cdtname like '%$cdtname$%'
di.csgs like '%$csgs$%'
di.lsqkks like '%$lsqkks$%'

select di.*,ct.cdtname,ct.cdtlevel from e_defuseinfo_t di LEFT JOIN e_contradictioninfo_t ct on di.cdtid=ct.id where di.validflag>0 and ct.validflag>0
di.workinfoid = #workinfoid#
di.cdtid = #cdtid#
ct.cdtname like '%$cdtname$%'
di.csgs like '%$csgs$%'
di.lsqkks like '%$lsqkks$%'
order by lsdate desc
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO e_defuseinfo_t (cdtid,lsdate,csgs,sflsqk,lsqkks,validflag,addoperatorid,addoperator,addtime,memo,workinfoid,attachments) VALUES ($cdtid$,'$lsdate$','$csgs$','$sflsqk$','$lsqkks$',$validflag$,$addoperatorid$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$',$workinfoid$,'$attachments$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE e_defuseinfo_t SET validflag = 0,updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$

UPDATE e_defuseinfo_t SET lsdate='$lsdate$',csgs='$csgs$',sflsqk='$sflsqk$',lsqkks='$lsqkks$',updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$', memo='$memo$',attachments='$attachments$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: select A.*,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.fileName order by sf.id) as filenames,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.id order by sf.id) as fileids from(SELECT * FROM e_defuseinfo_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND id = $id$)A LEFT JOIN sys_file_t sf on FIND_IN_SET(sf.id,A.attachments) GROUP BY A.id

select count(*) from zfw_e_defuseinfo_t di LEFT JOIN e_contradictioninfo_t ct on di.cdtid=ct.id where di.validflag>0 and ct.validflag>0
di.workinfoid = #workinfoid#
di.cdtid = #cdtid#
ct.cdtname like '%$cdtname$%'
di.csgs like '%$csgs$%'
di.lsqkks like '%$lsqkks$%'

select di.*,ct.cdtname,ct.cdtlevel from zfw_e_defuseinfo_t di LEFT JOIN e_contradictioninfo_t ct on di.cdtid=ct.id where di.validflag>0 and ct.validflag>0
di.workinfoid = #workinfoid#
di.cdtid = #cdtid#
ct.cdtname like '%$cdtname$%'
di.csgs like '%$csgs$%'
di.lsqkks like '%$lsqkks$%'
order by lsdate desc
sqlMap.update: UPDATE zfw_e_defuseinfo_t SET validflag='$validflag$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: select A.*,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.fileName order by sf.id) as filenames,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.id order by sf.id) as fileids from(SELECT * FROM zfw_e_defuseinfo_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND id = $id$)A LEFT JOIN zfw_sys_file_t sf on FIND_IN_SET(sf.id,A.attachments) GROUP BY A.id
